hero.title: H'Mong Cliff Villa
hero.subtitle: Where You Touch the Clouds
hero.desc: Experience a luxurious getaway in the heart of the Dong Van karst plateau, where traditional architecture blends with the majesty of nature.

about.label: Architecture & Vision
about.title: H'Mong Heritage Meets Minimalist Design
about.desc: Every room at H'Mong Cliff Villa is carefully crafted from local slate stone and dark natural wood. We honor indigenous culture while constantly innovating to deliver the finest comfort.

rooms.label: Rooms
rooms.title: Transparent Pricing
rooms.subtitle: Every space offers a different view of the Dong Van mountains.

items.name: H'Mong Suite
items.desc: Private balcony overlooking the cliff edge, natural stone bathtub, in-room breakfast service.

items.name: Valley View Room
items.desc: Large glass windows overlooking the valley, premium oak furnishings, free access to the infinity pool.

items.name: Cliff Bungalow
items.desc: Secluded on the cliffside, private warm-water pool, absolute privacy amid the clouds.

items.name: Cloud Terrace Family
items.desc: Private terrace for cloud-watching, two connecting bedrooms, perfect for families.

amenities.label: Amenities
amenities.title: Endless Experiences
amenities.subtitle: From quiet moments by the pool to journeys through untouched mountain wilderness.

testimonials.title: Guest Impressions
testimonials.subtitle: Memorable moments shared by Zenith's guests.

items.quote: A truly wonderful experience. Waking up to find myself drifting among the clouds. The villa's architecture is exquisite and the staff were incredibly attentive.
items.name: Minh Hoang

items.quote: Breakfast here was the highlight of the trip. Nothing compares to a hot bowl of pho in the cool highland mist.
items.name: Linh Vu

items.quote: The Cloud Terrace room was spacious enough for the whole family. The kids got to go trekking with a local guide — an unforgettable trip.
items.name: Thu Trang

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Begin your journey back to nature at H'Mong Cliff Villa. Our team is ready to assist you 24/7.
contact.address: Dong Van Karst Plateau, Ha Giang, Vietnam

footer.tagline: H'Mong Cliff Villa — Find peace again among the mountains of Dong Van.
